operating_ranges.evidence: 1 to 4 layers (up to 15 products per layer depending on settings)

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: requires cleaning after each use period
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: disinfect the screen according to the following recommendation

fault_conditions.name: action_required_indicator
fault_conditions.description: blinking button indicates user needs to perform an action
fault_conditions.evidence: A blinking button indicates that the user needs to perform an action

maintenance_actions.name: screen_cleaning
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: surface contamination and prevents accidental product activation
maintenance_actions.evidence: Press on the Clean the screen button... The countdown allows to clean the screen without the risk of starting a product

maintenance_actions.name: language_import
maintenance_actions.evidence: Languages can be imported by pressing Start Import

maintenance_actions.name: screen_import
maintenance_actions.evidence: Screens can be imported by pressing Start Import

assumptions.statement: Touch screen operates at 10.1 inch size as specified in component role
assumptions.reason: Size not explicitly stated in manual excerpts but provided in component description

assumptions.statement: Screen cleaning countdown prevents accidental activation during maintenance
assumptions.reason: Manual states countdown allows cleaning without risk of starting a product
